title: Optional privacy-preserving partner cohort dashboard (aggregate only)
context: An optional partner dashboard lets a steward see aggregate cohort outcomes (learners reached, readiness improvement) without ever storing individual learner records. Privacy is non-negotiable: aggregate counts only, no PII, no immigration status.
objective: Build an optional privacy-preserving partner cohort dashboard showing aggregate-only outcomes with no individual learner records.
acceptanceCriteria: Dashboard shows aggregate counts only (learners reached, readiness improvement); no individual learner records stored
No PII and no immigration-status data collected or displayed
Opt-in for partners; non-official/non-advice framing preserved
